name: WF_VERA — Weekly Agent Performance Report
description: Vera agent: every Monday 08:00 — query DB for agent activity logs, generate weekly performance report, send summary to Prem via Telegram.

parameters.query: SELECT pillar, COUNT(*) as task_count, MAX(created_at) as last_active FROM inbox_log WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY pillar ORDER BY task_count DESC;
